Home / Privacy Policy

Privacy Policy

Last updated: 2026

Introduction

Solopreneur Tools ("we," "our," or "us") respects your privacy. This Privacy Policy explains how we collect, use, disclose, and safeguard your information when you visit our website.

Information We Collect

Automatically Collected Information

When you visit our website, we may automatically collect:

  • IP address
  • Browser type and version
  • Device type
  • Pages visited and time spent
  • Referring website
  • Geographic location (country, city)

Information You Provide

We may collect information you voluntarily provide, including:

  • Email address (when subscribing to our newsletter)
  • Contact information (when reaching out)
  • Comments or feedback

How We Use Your Information

We use collected information to:

  • Provide, operate, and maintain our website
  • Send newsletters and updates (with your consent)
  • Respond to your inquiries and support requests
  • Analyze website usage and improve content
  • Detect and prevent fraud or abuse

Cookies and Tracking Technologies

We use cookies and similar technologies to enhance your experience. See our Cookie Policy for detailed information.

Third-Party Services

We may use third-party services that collect information, including:

  • Google Analytics: Website traffic analysis
  • Email marketing services: Newsletter management
  • Advertising networks: Display relevant ads

These services have their own privacy policies governing how they use your information.

Affiliate Links

Our website contains affiliate links to third-party products and services. When you click these links, third parties may collect information according to their own privacy policies. We encourage you to review their policies.

Data Security

We implement appropriate technical and organizational measures to protect your information. However, no method of transmission over the Internet is 100% secure.

Your Rights

Depending on your location, you may have the right to:

  • Access your personal information
  • Correct inaccurate information
  • Request deletion of your information
  • Opt out of marketing communications
  • Withdraw consent for data processing

To exercise these rights, please contact us.

Data Retention

We retain your information only as long as necessary for the purposes outlined in this policy, or as required by law.

Children's Privacy

Our website is not intended for children under 13. We do not knowingly collect information from children under 13.

International Users

If you are accessing our website from outside the country where it is hosted, please be aware that your information may be transferred to, stored, and processed in that country.

Changes to This Policy

We may update this Privacy Policy periodically. Changes will be posted on this page with an updated date.

Contact Us

If you have questions about this Privacy Policy, please contact us at:

Email: chikanda120@gmail.com

Solopreneur Tools

Essential tools and resources for solo business owners.
